title: ArtifactRemoved payload
description: Emitted (OPT-IN) when fs.remove deletes a path in record mode. Carries the removed path so fs.read provenance mode can record the deletion in a file's mutation history without re-reading the working tree. The default fs.remove does NOT emit. The artifact's entity reference lives in the envelope (entity_kind=artifact, entity_slug=removed absolute path); the removal intent is carried in the event rationale.

file_path.description: Absolute path of the removed entry. Matched verbatim by fs.read provenance mode (json_extract(payload,'$.file_path')).

was_dir.description: True when the removed entry was a directory rather than a file.
